Use CasesLaw VF4Competitive Gap Detection
Law V: Competitive RelativityF4: Competitive Position Measurementcombination

Competitive Gap Detection

Trigger

nScan analytics shows operator median 5G throughput 30% below market leader in three consecutive months in top-5 revenue cities.

Tools Required

Emblasoft nScan (Analytics)EmblasoftEmblasoft Evolver (Functional Testing)Emblasoft

Response at Each Autonomy Level

L1

Network planning team reviews gap report. CapEx re-prioritisation in next planning cycle.

L2

Automated parameter optimisation in affected geographies. Results tracked against competitor benchmark.

L3

Cross-domain optimisation triggered. Spectrum refarming initiated in identified gap zones.

L4

Autonomous network continuously monitors competitive position and adjusts resource allocation to maintain parity in prioritised geographies.

Economic Outcome

Competitive parity restored in high-revenue geographies before NPS gap widens into churn acceleration.

A 10-point NPS gap to market leader in a city of 500K subscribers correlates with 2–4% elevated churn. At €28 ARPU: 10,000 subscribers × €28 × 12 = €3.36M annual revenue at risk.

Combination Upgrade

Emblasoft Evolver (functional testing) validates nScan passive data with controlled active measurements, confirming the competitive gap before CapEx commitment.
